characters.appearance: A human right hand with a light complexion. The fingers are slender with short, neat fingernails.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Supernova के साथ रोज़ 10 मिनट इंग्लिश पढ़ने की practice करो। [Practice reading English for 10 minutes daily with Supernova.]
Unknown speaker says: All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others, [All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others,]
Unknown speaker says: equal [equal]
Unknown speaker says: important [important]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the core daily habit hook in Hindi, establishing Supernova as a practical learning tool.
- Demonstrates the interactive reading feature where tapping a word reads it aloud.
- Shows instant English-to-Hindi translation for vocabulary building.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट इंग्लिश पढ़ें
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
equal
[ˈiːkwəl]
समान
important
[ɪmˈpɔːtnt]
महत्वपूर्ण

Unknown speaker says: to try [to try]
Unknown speaker says: to remember the old words, [to remember the old words,]
Unknown speaker says: word [word]
Unknown speaker says: but something [but something]
Unknown speaker says: something [something]
Unknown speaker says: felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm [felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm]
Unknown speaker says: farm [farm]

Unknown speaker says: always [always]
Unknown speaker says: yet nothing was the same anymore. [yet nothing was the same anymore.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Continues the interactive reading demonstration with a focus on pronunciation.
- Highlights how users can learn contextual meanings of words in Hindi.
- Reinforces the ease of learning at one's own pace.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट इंग्लिश पढ़ें
GEORGE ORWELL की ANIMAL FARM
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.

कुछ
